hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+(push\s+--force|reset\s+--hard|checkout\s+\.\s*$|clean\s+-f)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git command detected. Use safer alternatives." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf|rm\s+.*\.meta"; then echo "BLOCKED: Deleting .meta files or rm -rf is not allowed." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in *.cs) if grep -n "GameObject.Find\|FindObjectOfType" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: GameObject.Find() detected. Use WiringService references instead." >&2; fi; if grep -n "console.log\|Console.Log" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Console.Log detected, use Debug.Log for Unity." >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0'
